'''hazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:swoopstake|swoopstake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swoopstake|swoopstake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:hazhate|hazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hazhatesher|hazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazhatesherĂ«m|hazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hazhatero|hazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hazhateshĂ«|hazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazhateshĂ«m|hazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihazhatero|gokihazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihazhateshĂ«|gokihazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazhateshĂ«m|gokihazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohazhankerom|gohazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohazhankeshĂ«|gohazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohazhankeshĂ«m|gohazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohazhankeya|gohazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hazhaterom|hazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazhatemu|hazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hazhateya|hazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihazhaterom|gokihazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazhatemu|gokihazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihazhateya|gokihazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:hazhazhate|hazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hazhazhatesher|hazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazhazhatesherĂ«m|hazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hazhazhatero|hazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hazhazhateshĂ«|hazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazhazhateshĂ«m|hazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihazhazhatero|gokihazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihazhazhateshĂ«|gokihazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazhazhateshĂ«m|gokihazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohazhazhankerom|gohazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohazhazhankeshĂ«|gohazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohazhazhankeshĂ«m|gohazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohazhazhankeya|gohazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hazhazhaterom|hazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazhazhatemu|hazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hazhazhateya|hazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihazhazhaterom|gokihazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazhazhatemu|gokihazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihazhazhateya|gokihazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠzhĂŠte|hĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠzhĂŠtesher|hĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠzhĂŠtero|hĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokihĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gohĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gohĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠzhĂŠterom|hĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠzhĂŠtemu|hĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠzhĂŠteya|hĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokihĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokihĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafzhafte|hafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafzhaftesher|hafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafzhaftesherĂ«m|hafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafzhaftero|hafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafzhafteshĂ«|hafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafzhafteshĂ«m|hafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafzhaftero|gokihafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafzhafteshĂ«|gokihafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafzhafteshĂ«m|gokihafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafzhafnkerom|gohafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafzhafnkeshĂ«|gohafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gohafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafzhafnkeya|gohafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafzhafterom|hafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafzhaftemu|hafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafzhafteya|hafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafzhafterom|gokihafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafzhaftemu|gokihafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafzhafteya|gokihafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
